params.name: Chilam Balam
params.description:
On Feb 15, 1570 AD, Maya priests recorded the history of their tribe and created the first Chilam Balam.
Chilam Balam is a historical document of the Maya people, meaning "the spokesman of the jaguar" in English. Its content is written in the Maya language using Latin letters, and it records the history of the Maya people before being conquered by the Spanish. When this book was written, the pictorial writing of the ancient Maya had been lost due to the cultural genocide policy of the Spanish …
